free_text: Data for neutron energy of 3.77 MeV.
The inelastic scattering of neutrons from Y-89
Pulsed proton beam on tritium gas target, 2.5 cm
.Hollow cylinder, 1.0 cm inner diam., 2.5 cm outer diam
and 5.0 cm long. Trace impurity of oxygen,
NE213 liquid scintillator in a shielded tank
.Corrected for the contribution of oxygen impurity,
but only for the 2.35 MeV data where the elastic
cross section is about 10% of the yttrium
value. At 3.77 MeV the oxygen elastic cross section
is greater than that of yttrium and is forward peaked
so that a detailed correction is impossible.
.Detailed correction of angular distribution data for
multiple scattering, flux attenuation and finite
geometry effects with a modified version of the MAGGIE
theoretical curves from the optical-model and
Errors quoted at one standard deviation.

corrected.REL-REF added. Meaningless zeros were deleted
from the data. Refs update. Subent 009 deleted (such
point is absent on fig.3, data given in Subent 005).
Data uncertain because of oxygen impurity.
